scenarios.title: Manual server setup
scenarios.code:
# DEPLOYMENT GUIDE
# 1. SSH into production server
# 2. cd /var/www/app
# 3. git pull origin main
# 4. npm install
# 5. npm run build
# 6. pm2 restart app
# 7. Check logs: tail -f /var/log/app.log
# NOTE: If this fails, ask Dave -- he set up the server
expectedFindings: git pull on production is risky (partial state)
